repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: Support Proposition 1 gives the same null-annihilator criterion for finite proximal functional point identification; ordinary DiD branch is standard

published_prior_art.cite: SoferRichardsonColicinoSchwartzTchetgen2016NOC + MiaoGengTchetgen2018ProxyVariables: ordinary DiD-as-NOC and proxy rank identification

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: finite bridge-fiber/null-loading frontier for proximal ATE point identification

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoGengTchetgen2018ProxyVariables gives proxy rank identification; Gregori2025DIDNegativeControls and ZhangEtAl2025NCCDiD give NC-DiD estimators/calibration, not this exact finite null-loading frontier

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proximal branch is the eid_proximal_phase_v1 null-annihilator point-identification criterion specialized to a DiD correction, while the ordinary branch is the standard DiD decomposition.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the survey misses the closer proximal-panel comparator Doubly Robust Proximal Synthetic Controls, which gives panel ATT identification formulas via proximal bridges.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship-aspirant comparator uses Gregori2025DIDNegativeControls and ZhangEtAl2025NCCDiD by bare bibkey without a section/equation/page anchor tying them to the claimed finite rank frontier gap.

soundness_flags.label: Setup / Assumption 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block calls W the negative-control exposure and Z the negative-control outcome, but the bridge h(W) conditional on Z and Assumption 4 use W as the outcome proxy and Z as the exposure proxy.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The iff frontier largely unfolds the finite bridge fiber definition: proximal DiD is well-defined exactly when B_P h=b_P is solvable and the ATT loading pi_P is invariant on the solution fiber.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Fix the W/Z proxy-role convention everywhere, then restate the negative-control exclusions in the same orientation as the bridge equation.
Add location-level anchors for Gregori 2025, Zhang et al. 2025, and the proximal-panel bridge literature, especially the exact estimator or identification equations the proposal tightens.

To reach flagship, upgrade Conjecture 1 from a finite linear-algebra well-definedness criterion to a strict comparator theorem for a named NC-DiD estimator, with an estimator/inference consequence or a genuinely wider open class than existing proximal panel bridge results.

recommended_next_step: Revise: repair the proxy-role convention, add the missing proximal-panel comparator anchors, and strengthen the kernel beyond the null-annihilator unfold if the target remains flagship.
